name: water-reminder
title: Water Reminder
description: Pulsing blue screen border reminds you to drink water every 15 minutes. Auto-skips when a meeting is detected.
author: tommy

commands.name: remind
commands.title: Water Reminder (Background)
commands.subtitle: Hydration
commands.description: Scheduled trigger — fires the pulsing overlay every 15 minutes unless a meeting is detected.

commands.name: sip-now
commands.title: Trigger Water Reminder Now
commands.subtitle: Hydration
commands.description: Manually trigger the pulsing overlay (bypasses meeting detection).

commands.name: configure
commands.title: Configure Meeting Detection
commands.subtitle: Hydration
commands.description: Pick which apps and browser tabs should pause the reminder when active.

preferences.name: helperPath
preferences.title: Helper Binary Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the compiled water-pulse binary. The mic-active probe is expected in the same directory.

preferences.name: skipWhenInMeeting
preferences.title: Meeting Detection
preferences.description: Skip the 15-minute reminder when a configured meeting app is active.
preferences.label: Skip reminders during meetings
